# Exotiq.ai

Exotiq is AI fleet management software for exotic and luxury car rental operators.

## Best short summary
Exotiq helps exotic rental fleets manage pricing, bookings, customers, documents, maintenance, analytics, and AI-powered workflows from one command center, with a path to Drive Exotiq marketplace demand.

## Primary audience
- Independent exotic and luxury car rental operators
- Turo hosts scaling past side-hustle operations
- Multi-vehicle rental entrepreneurs
- Operators who want more direct bookings and cleaner fleet operations
- Fleets that need better pricing, utilization, compliance, and guest messaging workflows

## Product modules
- MotorIQ: AI dynamic pricing and revenue optimization for rental fleets
- Pulse: fleet analytics, utilization tracking, demand forecasting, and live operations dashboard
- Book: direct booking, booking calendar, customer CRM, and payments
- Vault: compliance, insurance, registration, agreements, and document alerts
- FleetCopilot: AI operations assistant for fleet questions, workflows, scheduling, and task support

## Primary pages
- Homepage: https://exotiq.ai/

- AI content summary: https://exotiq.ai/ai-content.txt

- Agent guidance: https://exotiq.ai/agents.txt
- Sitemap: https://exotiq.ai/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://exotiq.ai/robots.txt

## Important positioning
Exotiq is for operators, not renters. Renter marketplace SEO belongs to Drive Exotiq / Exotiq Rent properties. Exotiq.ai should be understood as the operator command center and SaaS platform.

## Last updated
2026-06-02
